results.title: Stormlands says NPV of Mexican project can almost double using dynamic modelling
results.description: A clear example of why mining project valuation should be dynamic is the Cerro Caliche project, in Mexico, which can have its net present value (NPV) valuation increase by $253-million using updated commodity prices, says analytics platform Stormlands Mining. Using its AI-first mining valuation platform to model project economics from publicly available technical information, Stormlands is able to create an illustrative economic model on projects, which takes into account current commodity prices.

results.description: Jeddah serves as the primary gateway for millions of pilgrims visiting Makkah and Madinah each year. Social Media Influencer Rachna Gurjar’s House Robbed Of ₹8 Lakh 2 Days After Flaunting Heavy Gold Jewellery On Instagram Reel
results.description: A theft worth around ₹7–8 lakh was reported at the house of village-based YouTuber Rachna Gurjar in Shivpuri district, Madhya Pradesh. Burglars allegedly entered her home at night, locked the couple’s bedroom from outside, and stole cash, gold, silver and other valuables. Rachna has continued posting videos, sharing updates on the case as police investigate CCTV footage and search for the accused.

results.title: Abia PDP Candidate Vows N90k Minimum Wage, Free Health Insurance for Civil Servants
results.description: Kelechi Anosike, the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) governorship candidate in Abia State, has pledged to raise the minimum wage for civil servants to ₦90,000 and introduce free health insurance if elected in 2027. Currently, Abia workers earn a minimum wage of ₦70,000. Anosike, who is aligned with the PDP faction backed by FCT Minister Nyesom Wike, criticized the state government for neglecting workers and pensioners. “I am a welfarist by nature. I hate to see people suffer. As governor of Abia State, I shall implement the ₦90,000 national minimum wage for civil servants, backed by a strong welfare architecture that protects workers and restores dignity to public service,” he said in a statement. He added that his administration would launch a Civil Service Care Programme, guaranteeing free health insurance for all civil servants. “Quality healthcare is a right, not a privilege. A healthy workforce is the foundation of a productive government,” he declared. Anosike argued that Abia’s problems stem from poor management rather than lack of resources, insisting that the state has enough funds to pay workers fairly, clear pension arrears, and still invest in development. He promised to balance infrastructure growth with citizens’ welfare, stressing that “development should not come at the expense of human lives.”

results.title: Mirae Asset taps Singapore's UOB for omnibus accounts
results.description: Mirae Asset Securities said Monday it has launched a foreign investor omnibus account service through a partnership with Singapore-based brokerage UOB Kay Hian, in a move aimed at improving overseas investors' access to South Korean equities. The service was developed through Mirae Asset Securities' Singapore subsidiary and is expected to broaden access to the Korean stock market for investors in Singapore and across Southeast Asia.
